        More Savings, More Fun

        Visit Academy.com/disclaimers for terms and conditions

        ×

        Changes are Coming

        Big news! The Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card is transforming into the all-new myAcademy® Rewards Mastercard® Credit Card or myAcademy Rewards Credit Card. You’ll soon hear more information about which card you’ve been assigned.
        FOR NOW ENJOY FREE SHIPPING WITH NO MINIMUM‡ + 5% OFF EVERY DAY AT ACADEMY‡ When you use your existing card.
        Quick Links:
        What to Expect FAQs

        What to Expect

        Continue using your existing card until your new myAcademy Rewards card arrives.

        • March 19 through May 14

          We’re getting everything ready for you

          Continue using your Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card as you normally would to shop and save 5% on purchases† every day at Academy. Your current balance will transfer to your new card on May 15.

          Have any questions? Check out our FAQs to learn more.

        • On May 15

          Your card may transition to the all-new myAcademy Rewards Mastercard® Credit Card or myAcademy Rewards Credit Card.

        • June 15 through June 22

          Your new myAcademy Rewards Mastercard® or myAcademy Rewards Credit Card should arrive by mail.

          Expect an envelope labeled myAcademy Rewards Credit Card in the mail with your new card.

          Once your new card arrives:

          • Activate it and any card for your authorized buyers online in Account Center.
          • Go to your myAcademy Rewards account to update your card information. Then, set your new card as your default payment method.
          • Start shopping with your myAcademy Rewards card.

        • On September 30

          Your old card will deactivate.

        Frequently Asked Questions

        General

        The old Academy Sports + Outdoors credit cards is transitioning to the new myAcademy Rewards Mastercard® Credit Card or myAcademy Rewards Credit Card.
        If you are already a member of the myAcademy Rewards loyalty program, you’ll continue to enjoy loyalty benefits along with the benefits of your new myAcademy Rewards Credit Card. If you are not a current member, we highly encourage you to enroll today to get the full value of myAcademy Rewards.
        Yes! Keep using your current Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card as usual. You will continue to get your 5% off at Academy and free shipping. Your new myAcademy Rewards Credit Card will arrive by June 22, 2026. Once you have your new card, activate it online and start using it right away to earn.
        If you're not already a member and we have enough information on file, you will be enrolled in the myAcademy Rewards loyalty program when your card transitions. Separate terms and conditions apply. You can delete your myAcademy Rewards account at any time through your account management page.
        Yes! You do not need to wait for Academy to enroll you. We encourage you to enroll in myAcademy Rewards now to start enjoying benefits right away.
        No, the bank will assign you to a card product and you won't be able to choose or change your card.
        No. You will not be able to opt out of the new card since the old Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card program will no longer be offered.
        Not to worry - this change won’t appear as a closed account on your credit report. Instead, it will show that your Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card has transitioned to your all-new myAcademy Credit Card account.
        If you have any questions or haven't received your new card by June 22, 2026, please call Customer Care at:
        1-800-304-8710 (myAcademy Credit Card)
        1-800-217-8071 (myAcademy Mastercard® Credit Card)
        TDD/TTY: 1-888-819-1918

        Account and Payments

        Your account balance will automatically transfer to your new account on or after May 15, 2026, with no changes to your statement date or payment due date. Please continue making payments on any outstanding balance as outlined in your Credit Card Agreement.
        Yes. Any autopay you set up will carry over to your new account. You can review your new account details, including any existing scheduled or autopay settings, in Account Center after your transition is complete.
        Yes, any account preferences—such as paperless billing—will transfer to your new account. To enroll in paperless billing, please do so in Account Center. If you elect to receive paper billing statements, you may be charged a paper statement fee.3
        Yes. Your Account Center username and password will stay the same. If you haven't registered for online account management, visit Account Center to sign up.

        About Your New Card

        Once you receive your new card, you can activate it and start using it right away. For your security, remember to destroy your old Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card.
        Yes, your new myAcademy Rewards Credit Card will have a new account number, expiration date, and security code (CVC). Once you have your new card, please update your online Academy.com account with your new card number as your preferred payment method.
        Any authorized users on your existing account will receive a new card with an updated account number and expiration date. Be sure to activate all new cards and destroy old cards for your security. If you have more than one authorized buyer on your account, their cards may ship in a separate envelope.
        Your myAcademy Rewards credit cards may have a different credit limit. You can find it online in Account Center or in your welcome materials.
        Yes, if you receive the myAcademy Rewards Mastercard® Credit Card, you can add it to your digital wallet. We will contact you directly with instructions on how to save it to your digital wallet after May 15, 2026.

        CARD BENEFIT DETAILS

        †5% OFF EVERY DAY​
        Redemption Details: Cannot be combined with purchase on special financing or other Academy Credit Card offers except Free Shipping benefit. Excludes gift cards, licenses, and in-store services. See team member or visit academy.com/instore-services for list of in-store services. If more than one form of payment is used for a purchase online, cardmember will not receive 5% off. Account must not be in default.​

        ​

        ‡FREE SHIPPING​
        Limited to Standard Shipping. Cannot be combined with the Academy Sports + Outdoors employee discount. Bulk and select items may be excluded, see product page and https://www.academy.com/help/shipping-options for shipping information. Academy Sports + Outdoors does not ship to Alaska, California, Hawaii or outside of the United States. ​ ​

        Credit card offers are subject to credit approval.

        Academy Sports + Outdoors Credit Card Accounts are issued by Comenity Capital Bank.

        This credit card program is unavailable to California residents.​

        Get to the Fun Faster
